_comment: You do NOT need to create or edit this file. On first run, midea-cli discovers your AC on the LAN and auto-fills every value below (the token/key come from a one-time NetHome Plus cloud handshake), then writes the real config.json for you. This example only shows the shape of that generated file.
_comment_poll_interval: poll_interval is the only value you might tweak by hand: seconds between background temperature samples (default 60).
name: <auto-detected, e.g. Living Room AC>
